zh.lifeSummary: 當Egidia Stewart於1320年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾坎寧安時，她的父親Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland24歲，母親Isabel de Graham31歲。她和Sir Hugh Eglinton至少有2個女兒。她去世於1406年6月在蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾坎寧安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egidia Stewart于1320年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾坎寧安时，她的父亲Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland24岁，母亲Isabel de Graham31岁。她和Sir Hugh Eglinton至少有2个女儿。她去世于1406年6月在苏格兰雷福福爾享年86岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾坎寧安。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Egidia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Egidia Stewart was born in 1320, in Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland, was 24 and her mother, Isabel de Graham, was 31. She had at least 2 daughters with Sir Hugh Eglinton. She died in June 1406, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 86, and was buried in Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egidia Stewart est née en 1320, à Cunningham, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Graham, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Sir Hugh Eglinton. Elle est décédée en juin 1406, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Cunningham, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egidia Stewart 1320 in Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland 24 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Graham 31. Sie hatte mit Sir Hugh Eglinton mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1406 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Scotland und wurde in Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Stewart è nata il nel 1320 nel Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Graham, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Sir Hugh Eglinton. Morì nel giugno 1406, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Egidia Stewartが1320年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクウニンガムで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotlandは24歳，母Isabel de Grahamは31歳であった。彼女はSir Hugh Eglintonとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1406年6月にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで86歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアクウニンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Egidia Stewart(이)가 1320년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 쿤잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Graham(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Sir Hugh Eglinton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 6월 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 쿤잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egidia Stewart nasceu em 1320, em Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Graham, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Sir Hugh Eglinton. Ela faleceu em junho de 1406, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egidia Stewart родилась в 1320 г. в местности куннингхам, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Graham, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Sir Hugh Eglinton. Она умерла июнь 1406 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности куннингхам, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Egidia Stewart nació en 1320, en Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel de Graham, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Sir Hugh Eglinton. Murió en junio de 1406, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland.
